meaning: n.[药]可待因(自鸦片中提取的碱质),用以镇痛,镇咳,催眠等
examples: For parotid pain, aspirin or codeine is quite effective.
Some studies suggest it is better at suppressing coughs than codeine.
Aspirin and ibuprofen can cause fatal bleeding and codeine can cause severe constipation.
The answer lies in how codeine works relative to others in this drug class.
But if you are and take codeine, you convert much more of it to morphine than in most people.
